The base of the Omega Worm counts as an Entry Edge. Each Round, Friendly Units with a combined Supply cost of 2 or less may be Deployed via this Entry Edge.

upgrades.name: Leg Enhancements

upgrades.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and select the highest result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.
upgrades.name: Charge
Devastating Charge
upgrades.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.
When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.
upgrades.name: Zealous Round

upgrades.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3)
upgrades.name: Psi Blades

upgrades.description: When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, if the target is Engaged with at least 1 other Friendly Unit, this Unit Close Combat Weapon gains PRECISION (2).
upgrades.name: We Stand as One
Squadron
upgrades.description: This Unit’s Horizontal Coherency is 4".

When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (18) effect from the controlling player Entry Edge. No model may be placed Within 10" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.
upgrades.name: Burrow Ambush
Metabolic Boost
upgrades.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and select the highest result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.
Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge resolve the IMPACT (1) 5+ effect.
upgrades.name: Devastating Charge

upgrades.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 4+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3)
upgrades.name: Claws
Shredding Claws
upgrades.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 4+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light, Armoured (D3)

upgrades.name: Adrenal Glands
upgrades.description: This Unit’s Claws and Shredding Claws weapons gain PRECISION (2).
